message:
feat(cli): add hypothesis state transition commands

Implements brenner_bot-ucmp: Add State Transition CLI Commands

New commands:
- hypothesis activate <id>: Move from proposed to active
- hypothesis kill <id> --test=<id> [--reason]: Refute with evidence
- hypothesis refine <id> --child=<id>: Supersede with refined version
- hypothesis validate <id> --test=<id>: Confirm with test evidence
- hypothesis park <id> [--reason]: Defer for later
- hypothesis reactivate <id>: Resume deferred hypothesis
- hypothesis history <id>: Show full transition timeline

All commands:
- Support --json output mode
- Enforce required flags (--test for kill/validate, --child for refine)
- Log transitions to TransitionHistoryStore
- Provide clear error messages for invalid transitions

136 tests pass.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
